functions.name: initialize
functions.doc: Initialize a new campaign with strict validation on all inputs.

functions.name: donate
functions.doc: Donate to the campaign.

functions.name: get_total_raised
functions.doc: Return the total amount raised across all assets.

functions.name: get_donation_count
functions.doc: Return the total number of donations.

functions.name: get_donor_count
functions.doc: Return the number of unique donors.

functions.name: get_release_count
functions.doc: Return the number of milestone releases.

functions.name: get_total_tx_count
functions.doc: Return the total transaction count.

functions.name: get_campaign_report
functions.doc: Return a full campaign report.

functions.name: get_platform_summary
functions.doc: Return a platform-level summary.

functions.name: get_dashboard_metrics
functions.doc: Return dashboard analytics metrics.

functions.name: get_donor_record
functions.doc: Return the donor record for a given address.

functions.name: hello
functions.doc: Health-check entry point.

functions.name: version
functions.doc: Return the contract version.

functions.name: is_refund_eligible
functions.doc: Return whether a donor is eligible for a refund.

functions.name: claim_refund
functions.doc: Claim a refund for a donor.

functions.name: end_campaign
functions.doc: End the campaign.

functions.name: cancel_campaign
functions.doc: Cancel the campaign.

functions.name: extend_deadline
functions.doc: Extend the campaign deadline.

functions.name: get_campaign_status
functions.doc: Return the current campaign status.

functions.name: release_milestone
functions.doc: Release funds for a completed milestone (single asset).

functions.name: release_milestone_multi_asset
functions.doc: Release funds for a completed milestone (multi-asset).

functions.name: get_milestone_view
functions.doc: Return details for a specific milestone by index.

functions.name: get_all_milestones
functions.doc: Return all milestones with their current state.

functions.name: upgrade
functions.doc: Upgrade the contract WASM.

functions.name: freeze
functions.doc: Freeze the contract, halting all state-changing operations.

functions.name: unfreeze
functions.doc: Unfreeze the contract.
